titles.text: Simple Characters 2000 Series Vol. 16: Ganba no Bouken Puzzle

descriptions.text: Simple Characters 2000 Series vol.16: Ganba no Bouken Puzzle is an action puzzle game featuring characters from the anime series Ganba no Boken. The gameplay is about put the counter that is in botton right part of the screen to zero, in some stages that means destroy mouses, cats, birds or find all the items.
